verse_text: But they were terrified and frightened, and supposed they had seen a spirit.

pericope.title: The Women Find the Tomb Empty

links.context: Like Solomon, Christ will be established and magnified (v. 1); and like the king before the old altar (vv. 3-6), Christ will break bread with His disciples for the last time on earth ([[LUK.24:33]]-42). He will impart to them His own wisdom and understanding (v. 10; [[LUK.24:45]]). He will bear witness (v. 13) to them of His divinity. Then, He will ascend ([[LUK.24:50]]-53) into the heavenly Jerusalem (v. 13; [[HEB.12:22]]), bringing all creation with Him.
